inventory_alerts.message: NS1/RDT Kit stock depletes in 5 days under surge demand. Immediate resupply required.
IV Fluid stock depletes in 6 days under surge demand. Emergency procurement needed.

recommendations: CRITICAL: Activate surge bed protocol — 7 additional dengue beds needed immediately.
CRITICAL: Emergency resupply of NS1/RDT kits within 48 hours.
CRITICAL: Emergency resupply of IV Fluids within 48 hours.
Coordinate patient overflow to Sir Salimullah Medical College Hospital.
Deploy rapid response vector control team to high-density blocks.
Conduct community alert campaign targeting waterlogged areas.

recommendations: WARNING: 9 additional dengue beds required within 3 days.
WARNING: Expedite NS1/RDT kit resupply within 72 hours.
Prepare overflow ward capacity for dengue surge.
Increase outpatient dengue surveillance throughput.
Strengthen vector control near Buriganga riverbank corridor.
Maintain current bed capacity — no immediate gap detected.
Monitor NS1 stock weekly and plan resupply in 10 days.
Activate community-level dengue awareness messaging.
Increase household inspection frequency in lakeside areas.
